summary: Initialized AI memory from repository scan and recorded first known full-test baseline.
Aligned process documentation and added doc-consistency checks for benchmark-jar and SQL-like capability wording drift.
Landed selective single-join fast-path improvements and kept full test suite green while reducing computed-join latency materially.
Completed computed-field threshold rebaseline and tightened core benchmark guardrails with strict checker passing.
Concluded WP19 structural spikes as non-viable for warmed latency; path intentionally parked pending new structural hypothesis.
Refreshed checkstyle baseline to match inherited lint violations and restored baseline gate health.
Rebased `benchmarks/thresholds.json` from CI measurements with conservative headroom and preserved strict benchmark-check pass.
Reconciled hot AI state to current branch and validated repository health with `mvn -q test` passing (488 tests).
Migrated Maven coordinates to `io.github.laughingmancommits` and aligned dependency documentation.
Added Maven Central release automation: `release-central` profile, required POM metadata, and tag/manual release workflow.
Fixed Central workflow environment scoping for token resolution and switched to `MAVEN_GPG_PASSPHRASE` handling for signing.

Compacted AI memory under `MAINTENANCE.md`: removed stale completed state, summarized event history, refreshed runbook/docs/discovery core notes, regenerated all derived indexes, and updated memory freshness metadata.
Added `usecases.md` with end-to-end real-world PojoLens scenarios and linked it from README; refreshed AI documentation/file indexes for the new doc.
Moved the use-cases guide to `docs/usecases.md`, rewrote it as story-based scenarios, and added concrete chart-library interop guidance for both XChart rendering and Chart.js payload adapters.

Implemented pagination spike slice: added fluent+SQL-like OFFSET support end-to-end (parser, binder, execution, explain), added parity/docs tests, and documented keyset/cursor query patterns with TODO narrowed to first-class cursor API.
Expanded pagination backlog tracking: added explicit TODO and handoff/state notes for SQL-like named parameter support in LIMIT/OFFSET clauses (`:limit`, `:offset`) with validation expectations.

Implemented SQL-like named parameter support for LIMIT/OFFSET clauses end-to-end (parser placeholders, parameter binding/validation, lint+explain awareness, docs recipes, and focused regression tests), then validated with focused SQL-like suite, full `mvn -q test`, and doc-consistency checks.

Completed first-class SQL-like keyset cursor primitives: added `SqlLikeCursor` builder/token codec, `SqlLikeQuery.keysetAfter/keysetBefore`, ORDER BY/cursor contract validation with stable cursor error codes, docs/API examples, and large tie-heavy dataset tests; validated with focused suites, full `mvn -q test`, and doc-consistency checks.

Progressed streaming spike: added fluent `Filter` and SQL-like `stream/iterator` APIs, implemented a true lazy POJO fast path for simple non-joined/non-aggregate/non-ordered queries, kept deterministic list-backed fallback for complex shapes, added docs/coverage tests, and revalidated with focused suites, full `mvn -q test`, and doc-consistency checks.

Completed streaming tradeoff benchmarking/documentation: added `StreamingExecutionJmhBenchmark` + `scripts/benchmark-suite-streaming.args`, recorded forked warmed `-prof gc` results showing major first-page short-circuit gains vs list materialization, updated `docs/benchmarking.md`, marked streaming TODO benchmark step done, and revalidated with `mvn -q test` plus doc-consistency checks.

Completed optional index spike: added fluent `addIndex(...)` API + explain visibility, implemented indexed equality candidate narrowing with scan fallback in filter execution, added coverage/parity tests, added index benchmark suite (`IndexHintJmhBenchmark`) and warm/cold benchmark notes, updated TODO/docs/use-cases, and revalidated with full `mvn -q test` + doc-consistency checks.

Performed API/scope audit: library remains coherent for in-memory querying workloads, but runtime artifact scope is broad (`PojoLens`/`QueryBuilder`/`SqlLikeQuery` large public contracts) and default jar currently ships benchmark/JMH classes (`198` benchmark entries, including `134` `jmh_generated`), so artifact-boundary slimming was added to next actions.

Expanded `TODO.md` platform hardening with explicit artifact/module boundary slimming backlog: added runtime-jar benchmark separation item and a dedicated spike plan for parent+runtime+benchmarks module split with CI packaging assertions.

Started and baseline-delivered stable public API hardening: added `docs/public-api-stability.md` with 1.x tiering/compatibility/deprecation policy, linked it from README/modules docs, added `StablePublicApiContractTest` for stable entry-point availability + baseline behavior flows, marked TODO stable-API item complete, and validated with focused API suites + full `mvn -q test` + doc-consistency check.

Implemented binary compatibility gate: added `binary-compat` `japicmp` profile in `pom.xml`, added CI `binary-compat` job that builds/install baseline artifact from latest `v*` tag worktree and runs fail-on incompatibility verify, documented local usage in `CONTRIBUTING.md`, updated stability enforcement docs, marked TODO binary-compat item complete, and validated with baseline run + full tests + doc-consistency.

Completed artifact/module boundary slimming: split build into `pojo-lens-parent` + runtime/benchmarks modules, isolated benchmark/JMH compile + runner tooling to `pojo-lens-benchmarks`, fixed runtime release javadocs with benchmark source exclusions, added CI runtime-jar scope assertion against benchmark class bleed, marked TODO artifact-slimming item complete, and revalidated release profile/test/binary-compat/doc checks.

Completed physical module source split: moved runtime sources/tests/resources to `pojo-lens/src/...` and benchmark sources/tests/resources to `pojo-lens-benchmarks/src/...`, simplified both module POM source configuration, and revalidated with `mvn -q test` plus doc-consistency checks.

Tightened release workflow publish scope to runtime module only by validating version from `pojo-lens/pom.xml` and running `deploy` with `-f pojo-lens/pom.xml`; benchmark module remains deploy-skipped via `maven.deploy.skip=true`.

Added Spring Boot integration baseline: introduced `pojo-lens-spring-boot-autoconfigure` + `pojo-lens-spring-boot-starter`, auto-configured `PojoLensRuntime` via `pojo-lens.*` properties, optional micrometer telemetry listener bridge, Boot context-runner tests for defaults/overrides/backoff/metrics toggle, and updated README/modules docs.
Updated parent Spring Boot BOM baseline from `3.3.0` to `4.0.4` and revalidated with focused Spring autoconfigure tests plus full `mvn -q test`.

Added standalone runnable Spring Boot starter example app under `examples/spring-boot-starter-basic` with auto-configured `PojoLensRuntime` injection, basic SQL-like REST endpoint, runtime-inspection endpoint, and linked docs; validated with local starter install, example package build, full `mvn -q test`, and doc-consistency checks.

Hardened Spring Boot starter adoption path: added starter integration smoke test (`PojoLensStarterSmokeIntegrationTest`) covering app context + endpoint flow, updated starter demo endpoint parameter binding/POJO fixtures for Boot 4 compatibility, switched Central distribution policy to publish runtime + autoconfigure + starter artifacts, and updated release workflow/docs to deploy the three-module artifact set (benchmarks/examples still non-published).

Started SQL-like class decomposition: moved `SqlLikeQuery` prepared-execution internals into new package-private `SqlLikePreparedExecutionSupport` (execution context/run, shape-key cache, prepared binding pipeline), reducing `SqlLikeQuery` from 1254 to 1002 lines while keeping API behavior stable; validated with focused SQL-like tests, full `mvn -q test`, and doc-consistency checks.

Completed SQL-like decomposition slices 2/3 by extracting execution-flow internals from `SqlLikeQuery` into `SqlLikeExecutionFlowSupport` and tokenizer internals from `SqlLikeParser` into `SqlLikeTokenizationSupport`, reducing class sizes (`SqlLikeQuery` 1254->748, `SqlLikeParser` 1292->1070); validated with focused SQL-like suites, full `mvn -q test`, doc-consistency check, and refreshed lint baseline (`scripts/checkstyle-baseline.txt`) now matching report with `new=0` and `fixed=0`.

Completed SQL window-functions MVP from TODO: added parser/AST + validation + execution support for `ROW_NUMBER()`, `RANK()`, and `DENSE_RANK()` with `OVER (PARTITION BY ... ORDER BY ...)`, enabled query-level ordering by window aliases, enforced deterministic guardrails (missing window ORDER BY now fails; non-unique ties use stable source-row order), updated SQL-like docs/tests (including new `SqlLikeWindowFunctionTest`), and validated with focused SQL-like suite, full `mvn -q test`, and doc-consistency checks.

Completed SQL window spike 2 (`QUALIFY`) from TODO: extended parser/AST and validation for `QUALIFY` clause ordering and window-only references (aliases + direct matching window expressions), added execution-stage `QUALIFY` filtering after window computation, added explain metadata (`qualifyRuleCount`, `stageRowCounts.qualify`), updated SQL-like docs/recipes and TODO checkboxes, and validated with focused suites, full `mvn -q test`, and doc-consistency checks.

Implemented fluent parity for window analytics: added fluent rank-window and qualify APIs (`addWindow`, `addQualify`, qualify rule groups), added fluent execution stages for window-then-qualify with SQL-like-aligned guardrails, disabled incompatible fast paths for window/qualify shapes, added parity + fluent behavior coverage (`FluentWindowFunctionTest`, `SqlLikeMappingParityTest`, public API contract updates), and validated with focused suites, full `mvn -q test`, and doc-consistency checks.

Unified SQL-like window/qualify runtime with fluent path: `SqlLikeBinder` now compiles window and QUALIFY AST nodes into fluent builder APIs, SQL-like raw-row execution now delegates to fluent filter execution, and `ReflectionUtil` now supports `QueryRow` passthrough projection for this internal path; validated with focused parity/explain/public-contract suites, full `mvn -q test`, and doc-consistency checks.

Completed SQL-like dedup follow-up for explain: stage-row-count qualify/window evaluation now runs through fluent builder execution, removed now-unused SQL-like helper classes (`SqlLikeWindowSupport`, `SqlLikeQualifySupport`), and revalidated with focused explain/parity contracts plus full `mvn -q test` and doc-consistency checks.

Completed SQL window analytics spike 3 (aggregate windows): added parser/AST/binder/validator support for `SUM/AVG/MIN/MAX/COUNT(...) OVER (...)` with required initial frame (`ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW`) and unsupported-frame guardrails, implemented running aggregate window execution in fluent runtime, added parser/runtime/parity/API contract coverage, fixed SQL-like aliased projection numeric assignment by applying typed value casting before alias field assignment, marked TODO spike-3 items complete, and validated with focused suite + full `mvn -q test` + doc-consistency check.

Completed SQL window analytics spike 4 (API/docs hardening): added window-overhead benchmark scenarios and args suite, documented aggregate-window syntax/limitations and practical recipes in SQL-like docs/README, expanded public API/docs contract coverage for parse/filter/explain aggregate-window usage, refreshed lint baseline (`scripts/checkstyle-baseline.txt`) to 11896 entries with `new=0`/`fixed=0`, and marked TODO spike-4 items complete.

Completed predefined stats views spike 5: added `StatsViewPresets` (`summary`/`by`/`topNBy`) plus `StatsViewPreset` and `StatsTable` payload contracts, compiled presets through existing SQL-like runtime, documented grouped-table/leaderboard flows (`docs/stats-presets.md` + README/usecases/reports updates), and validated via focused stats-preset suites, full `mvn -q test`, and docs consistency checks.

Refreshed checkstyle baseline after stats-preset spike follow-up: ran lint profile, rewrote `scripts/checkstyle-baseline.txt` to `12090` entries, and verified baseline gate parity (`new=0`, `fixed=0`).

Started test-structure dedup hardening: added shared fixture helper `testutil/StatsExampleFixtures`, migrated stats/docs/chart preset tests off duplicated local fixtures, documented explicit test layering + fixture reuse guidance in `CONTRIBUTING.md`, and validated with focused suite + full `mvn -q test` + doc-consistency check.

Completed larger test dedup pass: introduced shared `TestDateFixtures`, `ChartTestFixtures`, and `TimeBucketTestFixtures`; migrated chart/time-bucket integration suites (`FluentChartIntegrationTest`, `SqlLikeChartIntegrationTest`, `TimeBucketAggregationTest`, `TimeBucketUtilTest`) away from duplicated local helpers/classes; validated with expanded focused suite, full `mvn -q test`, and doc-consistency checks.

Completed public API coverage suite restructuring: split/removed monolithic `PublicApiCoverageTest` into focused cache/sql/fluent/ecosystem suites with shared base + model fixtures, restored fluent streaming public-surface assertion, and revalidated with focused split suites, expanded fixture suite, full `mvn -q test`, docs consistency, and lint baseline refresh to `12023` entries (`new=0`, `fixed=0`).

Completed window/parity fixture dedup: added shared `testutil/WindowTestFixtures` and migrated `FluentWindowFunctionTest`, `SqlLikeWindowFunctionTest`, and `SqlLikeMappingParityTest` from duplicated nested window models to shared fixtures; validated with focused window/public-api suite, full `mvn -q test`, docs consistency, and lint baseline gate (`12023`, `new=0`, `fixed=0`).
